languages.text: "Будьте осторожны, Вольный Торговец. Здешние машины поглощены безумием и оттого непредсказуемы".
"Be on your guard, Rogue Trader. The machines here are consumed by madness and are therefore unpredictable."
languages.original_text: "Будьте осторожны, Вольный Торговец. Здешние машины поглощены безумием и оттого непредсказуемы".

traits.locale_text: "Be on your guard, Rogue Trader. The machines here are consumed by madness and are therefore unpredictable."
"Be on your guard, Rogue Trader. The machines here are consumed by madness and are therefore unpredictable."
"Be on your guard, Rogue Trader. The machines here are consumed by madness and are therefore unpredictable."
"Be on your guard, Rogue Trader. The machines here are consumed by madness and are therefore unpredictable."

languages.text: «No baje la guardia, Comerciante. Estas máquinas están consumidas por la locura y, por tanto, son impredecibles».
languages.original_text: "Be on your guard, Rogue Trader. The machines here are consumed by madness and are therefore unpredictable."

traits.locale_text: «No baje la guardia, Comerciante. Estas máquinas están consumidas por la locura y, por tanto, son impredecibles».

languages.text: “保持警惕，行商浪人。这里的机械已经被疯狂彻底吞噬，它们的行为难以预测。”
languages.original_text: "Be on your guard, Rogue Trader. The machines here are consumed by madness and are therefore unpredictable."

traits.locale_text: “保持警惕，行商浪人。这里的机械已经被疯狂彻底吞噬，它们的行为难以预测。”

languages.text: "Seid vorsichtig, {mf|Freihändler|Freihändlerin}. Die Maschinen hier sind dem Wahnsinn verfallen und somit unberechenbar."
languages.original_text: "Be on your guard, Rogue Trader. The machines here are consumed by madness and are therefore unpredictable."

traits.locale_text: "Seid vorsichtig, {mf|Freihändler|Freihändlerin}. Die Maschinen hier sind dem Wahnsinn verfallen und somit unberechenbar."

languages.text: « Restez sur vos gardes, {mf|libre-marchand|libre-marchande}. Les machines ici présentes sont atteintes de démence, ce qui les rend totalement imprévisibles. »
languages.original_text: "Be on your guard, Rogue Trader. The machines here are consumed by madness and are therefore unpredictable."

traits.locale_text: « Restez sur vos gardes, {mf|libre-marchand|libre-marchande}. Les machines ici présentes sont atteintes de démence, ce qui les rend totalement imprévisibles. »

languages.text: "Tetikte olun Hür Tacir. Buradaki makineler, delilik tarafından tüketilmiş. Bu yüzden de öngörülemezler."
languages.original_text: "Be on your guard, Rogue Trader. The machines here are consumed by madness and are therefore unpredictable."

traits.locale_text: "Tetikte olun Hür Tacir. Buradaki makineler, delilik tarafından tüketilmiş. Bu yüzden de öngörülemezler."

languages.text: 「用心しろ、ローグトレーダー。この機械は狂気に支配されており、予測不可能だ。」
languages.original_text: "Be on your guard, Rogue Trader. The machines here are consumed by madness and are therefore unpredictable."

traits.locale_text: 「用心しろ、ローグトレーダー。この機械は狂気に支配されており、予測不可能だ。」
